titleStmt.title: SII 24.462: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 462. (A.R. No. 139 of 1947-48.) III. PRĀKĀRA, TIERS OF THE SVARGA-VĀŚAL.

summary.p: Records the gift of Paṉaikkuṟuchchi in Atikamaṅgalappaṟṟu-śīrmai towards food offerings to the god by Raṅgarājar, son of Manuvīra Chokkarāja, a Svayam-vyakta-pradhāna of Śrīraṅgam. One fourth share of the offerings is allotted to the Aḻagiya-maṇavāḷajīyar-maṭha. The details of the date viz., Śaka 1468, Parābhava, Kuṁbha, śu. 2, Monday, Uttiraṭṭādi, regularly correspond to 1547, A.D. February 21, Monday; ·91, ·71.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran rājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvirapratāpa śrīvirasadāśivadevamahārāyar prathuvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdham 1000 4 100 6 10 8 Itaṉ mel cellāniṉṟa parābhavasamvatsarañca Uttarāyanattu kumbhanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu dvitikaiyum somavāramum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭāti nakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉka
rai pāṇṭi kulācanivaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati svayamvyattapradhānarāna manuvira cokkarājāviṉ puttran raṅgarājar deṇḍan samarppi- ttu śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi . teṉkarai tirucilāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭi Atikamaṅkalapaṟṟu śīrmaiyil tiruviḷaiyāṭṭamākac cetta cevvantiṉātar tevatānamāka vi ttirukkuṟuccikku meṟkku [ capa] ttikku
vaṭakku tripuvanatevikku kiḻakku �varikkum tirumalai nāyakkar toppukkut teṟkku Iṉṉāṉku Ellaikku Uḷppaṭṭap paṉaikkuṟuccigrāmam Ūroṉṟukku kku 7 pramāṇappaṭi Uḻaviṉāl nilam 2 10 3 li [ cegānati] Itaṟkku U ṭṭa tiru maṉai toppu nilam 2(1/2)veli perumāḷ śrīpaṇṭārattu nilam kku tirucciṉāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭi rekaippaṭi ḷa6 10 4kku ṉāḷoṉṟukku Amutu ceytu
Aruḷumpaṭi campāttaḷikai 2 Inta taḷikai 2 kkum Amutupaṭi neyya (a)mutu kaṟiamutu vaṭa campāramum kovil paṇṭārattile viṭṭu Inta paṉaikkuṟuccigrāmam candrādityavaraiyu mikkovilp paṇṭārattile Aṉupavittuk koḷḷak kaṭavarākavum Intappaṭi Amutu ceytu ḷumantaḷikaik koṇṭu lat toṉṟu ṉānāḻi prasādamum Aḻakiya maṇavāḷajiyar ma
ṭattukku śiṣyapāraṅparai Āka Ācandrārkasthāyi Āka Anupavittu koḷḷak kaṭavarākavum § Ippaṭikku Inta śilācāsanam Eḻutinamaikku kovilk kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇappiriyar Eḻuttu § dānapālanayormaddhye dānāt śreyonupālanam . dānāt svarggamavāpnoti pālanāt Accutam padam . §
Digital edition of SII 24.462 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
